						}
					}

				}

					for (var index = 0; index < disableStrs.length; index++) {
						window[disableStrs[index]] = true;

					for (var index = 0; index < disableStrs.length; index++) {

					</div>
	</div>

	<div class="cnvs-block-section cnvs-block-section-1717075261777 cnvs-block-section-layout-full cnvs-block-section-fullwidth" >
		<div class="cnvs-block-section-outer" style="">
			<div class="cnvs-block-section-inner">
				

<div class="cnvs-block-section-content cnvs-block-section-content-1717075261775" >
	<div class="cnvs-block-section-content-inner">
		

<h2 class="cnvs-block-section-heading cnvs-block-section-heading-1717075261769 is-style-cnvs-block-section-heading-5 haligncenter" >
	<span class="cnvs-section-title">

									</h2>

									<ul class="post-meta"><li class="meta-author"><span class="author"><a class="url fn n" href="https://www.zelda.it/author/zelda/" title="View all posts by Frederick" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Frederick</a></span></li><li class="meta-date"><a href="https://www.appuntidizelda.it/airhelp-come-ottenere-fino-a-600/" rel="bookmark">7 Agosto 2025</a></li></ul>

					<article class=" layout-type-primary layout-size-small layout-typography-small post-31177 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail category-consigli-di-viaggio tag-7-applicazioni-per-viaggiatori-da-non-perdere tag-applicazioni-per-viaggiatori tag-blog tag-expedia tag-kayak tag-momondo tag-news tag-skiplagged tag-skyscanner tag-tips-di-viaggio tag-viaggiare tag-viaggio">

						<div class="post-outer overlay">
							<div class="overlay-media parallax" >
								<img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="560" height="560" src="https://www.appuntidizelda.it/wp-content/uploads/2023/02/image-33-560x560.png" class="jarallax-img wp-post-image" alt="image 33" srcset="https://www.appuntidizelda.it/wp-content/uploads/2023/02/image-33-560x560.png 560w, https://www.appuntidizelda.it/wp-content/uploads/2023/02/image-33-80x80.png 80w, https://www.appuntidizelda.it/wp-content/uploads/2023/02/image-33-500x500.png 500w, https://www.appuntidizelda.it/wp-content/uploads/2023/02/image-33-120x120.png 120w, https://www.appuntidizelda.it/wp-content/uploads/2023/02/image-33-90x90.png 90w, https://www.appuntidizelda.it/wp-content/uploads/2023/02/image-33-320x320.png 320w, https://www.appuntidizelda.it/wp-content/uploads/2023/02/image-33-800x800.png 800w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 560px) 100vw, 560px" title="7 applicazioni per viaggiatori da non perdere 12">							</div>

							<div class="overlay-outer post-inner">
								<div class="overlay-inner">

									<ul class="post-meta"><li class="meta-category"><ul class="post-categories">
	<li><a href="https://www.appuntidizelda.it/consigli-di-viaggio/" rel="category tag">Consigli di viaggio</a></li></ul></li></ul>

							<div class="post-outer">
																	<div class="post-inner">
										<div class="post-thumbnail">

	<li><a href="https://www.appuntidizelda.it/la-dispensa-dei-vini/" rel="category tag">La dispensa dei vini</a></li></ul></div>

<h2 class="cnvs-block-section-heading cnvs-block-section-heading-1709891048044 is-style-cnvs-block-section-heading-5 haligncenter" >
	<span class="cnvs-section-title">
		<span>Ti parlo di una cantina</span>
	</span>
</h2>



	<div class="cnvs-block-posts cnvs-block-posts-1709891048063 cnvs-block-posts-layout-tiles-9">

					<article class=" layout-type-primary layout-size-small layout-typography-small post-42617 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail category-ti-parlo-di-una-cantina tag-amarone-della-valpolicella-docg tag-azienda-agricola-fugolo-gianluca tag-corvina tag-olivicoltori tag-peschicoltori tag-rosato-veronese-igt tag-rose-brioso-igt tag-valpolicella tag-valpolicella-doc-classico-superiore tag-veneto tag-viticoltori tag-wine-experience">

									</h2>

									<ul class="post-meta"><li class="meta-author"><span class="author"><a class="url fn n" href="https://www.zelda.it/author/zelda/" title="View all posts by Frederick" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Frederick</a></span></li><li class="meta-date"><a href="https://www.appuntidizelda.it/azienda-agricola-fugolo-gianluca-pescantina/" rel="bookmark">2 Gennaio 2026</a></li></ul>

					<article class=" layout-type-primary layout-size-small layout-typography-small post-42551 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail category-ti-parlo-di-una-cantina tag-amarone-artigianale-valpolicella-classica-fumane tag-amarone-della-valpolicella-classico-artigianale tag-cantina-familiare-valpolicella-classica tag-cantina-giovanni-dindo tag-cantina-giovanni-dindo-valpolicella-classica tag-cantine-valpolicella-classica-fumane tag-degustazione-vini-valpolicella-classica-a-fumane tag-piccoli-produttori-valpolicella tag-valpolicella tag-valpolicella-ripasso-classico-superiore tag-veneto tag-vini-della-valpolicella-classica tag-visita-guidata-cantina-con-degustazione-valpolicella tag-visita-in-cantina-valpolicella">

						<div class="post-outer overlay">
							<div class="overlay-media parallax" >

	<div class="cnvs-block-section cnvs-block-section-1765266346888 cnvs-block-section-layout-full cnvs-block-section-fullwidth" >

<div class="cnvs-block-section-content cnvs-block-section-content-1765266346887" >
	<div class="cnvs-block-section-content-inner">
		

<h2 class="cnvs-block-section-heading cnvs-block-section-heading-1765266346880 is-style-cnvs-block-section-heading-5 haligncenter" >
	<span class="cnvs-section-title">
		<span>Emporio degli Aromi</span>
	</span>
</h2>



	<div class="cnvs-block-posts cnvs-block-posts-1765266346884 cnvs-block-posts-layout-tiles-6">

		<div class="cs-block-tiles tiles-6">

			<div class="tiles-outer">

				
					<article class=" layout-type-primary layout-size-large layout-typography-large post-42484 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail category-la-stanza-del-te-e-del-caffe tag-caffe-speciality-2 tag-caffe-speciality tag-chronic tag-ginevra tag-specialty-coffee tag-svizzera">

						<div class="post-outer overlay">
							<div class="overlay-media parallax" >
								<img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="840" height="1160" src="https://www.appuntidizelda.it/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/chronic-specialty-kaffee-840x1160.webp" class="jarallax-img wp-post-image" alt="chronic specialty kaffee" title="Chronic: dalla Svizzera, la rivoluzione del caffè specialty sostenibile 31">							</div>

							<div class="overlay-outer post-inner">
								<div class="overlay-inner">

									<ul class="post-meta"><li class="meta-category"><ul class="post-categories">
	<li><a href="https://www.appuntidizelda.it/la-stanza-del-te-e-del-caffe/" rel="category tag">La stanza del tè e del caffè</a></li></ul></li></ul>
									<h2 class="entry-title">
										<a href="https://www.appuntidizelda.it/chronic-dalla-svizzera-caffe-sostenibile/">Chronic: dalla Svizzera, la rivoluzione del caffè specialty sostenibile</a>
									</h2>

									<ul class="post-meta"><li class="meta-author"><span class="author"><a class="url fn n" href="https://www.appuntidizelda.it/author/redazione/" title="View all posts by redazione">redazione</a></span></li></ul>
									
									
								</div>

<h2 class="cnvs-block-section-heading cnvs-block-section-heading-1728205314689 is-style-cnvs-block-section-heading-5 haligncenter" >
	<span class="cnvs-section-title">
		<span>Che tipo di locale vuoi provare?</span>

								<div class="post-inner">

									<header class="entry-header">
										<div class="meta-category"><ul class="post-categories">
	<li><a href="https://www.appuntidizelda.it/locali/" rel="category tag">Locali</a></li></ul></div>
										<h2 class="entry-title">

					<article class=" layout-type-primary layout-size-small layout-typography-small post-38109 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail category-ti-parlo-di-unazienda tag-conoscere-olio-extravergine-di-oliva tag-famiglia-orlandi tag-frantoio-a-illasi tag-frantoio-famiglia-orlandi tag-illasi tag-localita-americani tag-oleificio-verona tag-olio-evo tag-olio-extravergine-di-oliva tag-olio-favarol tag-olio-fioi tag-olio-grignano tag-olioturismo tag-press-tour tag-valpolicella tag-verona tag-visita-frantoio">

						<div class="post-outer overlay">
							<div class="overlay-media parallax" >

											<article class="layout-size-large post-40950 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail category-libri tag-angelo-costacurta-malvasia tag-cosa-significa-malvasia tag-differenza-tra-malvasia-dolce-e-secca tag-kellermann-editore tag-libri tag-libro-malvasia-angelo-costacurta tag-malvasia tag-malvasia-cosa-abbinarci tag-malvasia-delle-lipari tag-malvasia-di-candia tag-malvasia-di-monemvasia tag-malvasia-istriana tag-malvasia-origine-greca tag-malvasia-varieta-italiane tag-malvasia-venezia tag-malvasia-vino-dolce tag-malvasia-vitigno tag-storia-della-malvasia tag-storia-della-malvasia-veneziana tag-varieta-di-malvasia tag-vini-aromatici-italiani tag-vini-famosi-della-serenissima tag-vino tag-vino-greco-antico tag-vino-malvasia-caratteristiche tag-vino-malvasia-da-dove-viene">
							<div class="post-thumbnail">
								<img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="560" height="840" src="https://www.appuntidizelda.it/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/Malvasia.-Il-vino-prezioso-dOriente-che-Venezia-rese-nobile-nel-Mediterraneo-scaled.png" class="size-carousel wp-post-image" alt="Malvasia. Il vino prezioso d’Oriente che Venezia rese nobile nel Mediterraneo 58">
																	<div class="post-more">
										<a href="https://www.appuntidizelda.it/malvasia-il-vino-prezioso-recensione/" class="button-link">
											<span>Leggi l&#039;articolo</span>
										</a>
									</div>
									
																<a href="https://www.appuntidizelda.it/malvasia-il-vino-prezioso-recensione/"></a>
							</div>

							<div class="meta-category"><ul class="post-categories">
	<li><a href="https://www.appuntidizelda.it/libri/" rel="category tag">Libri</a></li></ul></div>
							<h2 class="entry-title">
								<a href="https://www.appuntidizelda.it/malvasia-il-vino-prezioso-recensione/">Malvasia. Il vino prezioso d’Oriente che Venezia rese nobile nel Mediterraneo</a>
							</h2>

													</article>

	<div class="cnvs-block-section cnvs-block-section-1570800526010 cnvs-block-section-layout-full cnvs-block-section-fullwidth" >

	<div class="cnvs-block-section-content-inner">
		

<h2 class="cnvs-block-section-heading cnvs-block-section-heading-1709889712749 is-style-cnvs-block-section-heading-5 haligncenter" >
	<span class="cnvs-section-title">
		<span>Viaggiare</span>
	</span>
</h2>



	<div class="cnvs-block-posts cnvs-block-posts-1709888571751 cnvs-block-posts-layout-tiles-9">

		<div class="cs-block-tiles tiles-9">

			<div class="tiles-outer">

				
					<article class=" layout-type-primary layout-size-small layout-typography-small post-42490 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail category-viaggiare tag-frantoi-lago-di-garda tag-frantoi-sul-garda tag-frantoio-del-garda tag-frantoio-lago-di-garda tag-il-primo-museo-dellolio-in-italia tag-lago-di-garda tag-museo-dell-olio tag-museo-dellolio tag-museo-dellolio-a-cisano-di-bardolino tag-museo-dellolio-bardolino tag-museo-olio tag-oleifici-del-garda tag-oleificio-cisano-bardolino tag-olio-garda-dop tag-olio-museum tag-vendita-olio-lago-di-garda tag-veneto">

						<div class="post-outer overlay">
							<div class="overlay-media parallax" >
								<img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="560" height="560" src="https://www.appuntidizelda.it/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Museum-dellOlio-7-560x560.webp" class="jarallax-img wp-post-image" alt="Museum dellOlio 7" srcset="https://www.appuntidizelda.it/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Museum-dellOlio-7-560x560.webp 560w, https://www.appuntidizelda.it/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Museum-dellOlio-7-80x80.webp 80w, https://www.appuntidizelda.it/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Museum-dellOlio-7-500x500.webp 500w, https://www.appuntidizelda.it/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Museum-dellOlio-7-120x120.webp 120w, https://www.appuntidizelda.it/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Museum-dellOlio-7-90x90.webp 90w, https://www.appuntidizelda.it/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Museum-dellOlio-7-320x320.webp 320w, https://www.appuntidizelda.it/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Museum-dellOlio-7-800x800.webp 800w, https://www.appuntidizelda.it/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Museum-dellOlio-7-1160x1160.webp 1160w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 560px) 100vw, 560px" title="Visita al Museum dell’Olio di Bardolino: cosa vedere, cosa fare e degustazioni sul Lago di Garda 66">							</div>

							<div class="overlay-outer post-inner">
								<div class="overlay-inner">

									<ul class="post-meta"><li class="meta-category"><ul class="post-categories">
	<li><a href="https://www.appuntidizelda.it/viaggiare/" rel="category tag">Viaggiare</a></li></ul></li></ul>

					<article class=" layout-type-primary layout-size-small layout-typography-small post-41702 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail category-viaggiare tag-arqua-petrarca tag-borghi-medievali tag-borghi-piu-belli-ditalia-veneto tag-borghi-storici-italia tag-borghi-storici-veneto tag-borghi-veneto tag-casa-del-petrarca tag-chiesa-di-santa-maria-assunta tag-colli-euganei tag-colli-euganei-turismo tag-cosa-vedere-a-monselice tag-cosa-vedere-ad-arqua-petrarca tag-dove-mangiare tag-enogastronomia tag-gite-da-fare-nel-fine-settimana tag-gite-fuori-portata tag-giuggiole-arqua-petrarca tag-itinerario-monselice-arqua-petrarca tag-monselice tag-santuario-delle-sette-chiesette tag-tomba-di-francesco-petrarca tag-turismo-culturale tag-veneto tag-viaggi-lenti tag-weekend-in-veneto">

						<div class="post-outer overlay">
							<div class="overlay-media parallax" >

	<div class="cnvs-block-section cnvs-block-section-1709890799437 cnvs-block-section-layout-full cnvs-block-section-fullwidth" >
		<div class="cnvs-block-section-outer" style="">
			<div class="cnvs-block-section-inner">
				

<div class="cnvs-block-section-content cnvs-block-section-content-1709890799420" >
	<div class="cnvs-block-section-content-inner">
		

<h2 class="cnvs-block-section-heading cnvs-block-section-heading-1709890799378 is-style-cnvs-block-section-heading-5 haligncenter" >
	<span class="cnvs-section-title">
		<span>Ricette</span>
	</span>
</h2>



	<div class="cnvs-block-posts cnvs-block-posts-1709890799402 cnvs-block-posts-layout-tiles-7">

		<div class="cs-block-tiles tiles-7">

			<div class="tiles-outer">

				
					<article class=" layout-type-primary layout-size-large layout-typography-large post-29349 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail category-ricette tag-cucina tag-polpette tag-polpette-di-mandorle tag-polpette-di-pistacchi tag-polpette-di-tacchino tag-polpette-di-tacchino-con-pistacchi-e-mandorle tag-ricette tag-ricette-estive tag-ricette-semplici tag-ricette-veloci">

						<div class="post-outer overlay">
							<div class="overlay-media parallax" >

<h2 class="cnvs-block-section-heading cnvs-block-section-heading-1734690209636 is-style-cnvs-block-section-heading-5 haligncenter" >
	<span class="cnvs-section-title">
		<span>La Dispensa del Cottage</span>

												<article class=" layout-type-primary layout-size-small layout-variation-simple layout-typography-small post-23424 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail category-la-dispensa-del-cottage tag-autunno tag-bevande-da-bere-in-autunno tag-blog tag-cosa-bere-in-autunno tag-cucina tag-libri">

							<div class="post-outer">
																	<div class="post-inner">
										<div class="post-thumbnail">
											<img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="120" height="120" src="https://www.appuntidizelda.it/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/beech-10835_1280-120x120.jpg" class="attachment-csco-120-square size-csco-120-square wp-post-image" alt="beech 10835 1280" srcset="https://www.appuntidizelda.it/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/beech-10835_1280-120x120.jpg 120w, https://www.appuntidizelda.it/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/beech-10835_1280-80x80.jpg 80w, https://www.appuntidizelda.it/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/beech-10835_1280-500x500.jpg 500w, https://www.appuntidizelda.it/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/beech-10835_1280-90x90.jpg 90w, https://www.appuntidizelda.it/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/beech-10835_1280-320x320.jpg 320w, https://www.appuntidizelda.it/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/beech-10835_1280-560x560.jpg 560w, https://www.appuntidizelda.it/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/beech-10835_1280-800x800.jpg 800w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 120px) 100vw, 120px" title="5 bevande in autunno da bere 86">

									<header class="entry-header">
										<div class="meta-category"><ul class="post-categories">
	<li><a href="https://www.appuntidizelda.it/la-dispensa-del-cottage/" rel="category tag">La dispensa del cottage</a></li></ul></div>

		</div>

	<div class="cnvs-block-section cnvs-block-section-1738659317911 cnvs-block-section-layout-full cnvs-block-section-fullwidth" >
		<div class="cnvs-block-section-outer" style="">
			<div class="cnvs-block-section-inner">
				

<div class="cnvs-block-section-content cnvs-block-section-content-1738659317907" >
	<div class="cnvs-block-section-content-inner">
		

<h2 class="cnvs-block-section-heading cnvs-block-section-heading-1738659317898 is-style-cnvs-block-section-heading-5 haligncenter" >
	<span class="cnvs-section-title">
		<span>Lifestyle</span>

					<article class=" layout-type-primary layout-size-small layout-typography-small post-38855 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail category-lifestyle tag-avvento tag-boom-di-ricerche-calendario-dellavvento-2024 tag-calendario-avvento tag-calendario-avvento-italia tag-calendario-avvento-italia-2024">

						<div class="post-outer overlay">
							<div class="overlay-media parallax" >
								<img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="560" height="560" src="https://www.appuntidizelda.it/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/elena-mozhvilo-wBenc1bRgGI-unsplash-560x560.jpg" class="jarallax-img wp-post-image" alt="Calendario dell&#039;Avvento" srcset="https://www.appuntidizelda.it/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/elena-mozhvilo-wBenc1bRgGI-unsplash-560x560.jpg 560w, https://www.appuntidizelda.it/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/elena-mozhvilo-wBenc1bRgGI-unsplash-1920x1920.jpg 1920w, https://www.appuntidizelda.it/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/elena-mozhvilo-wBenc1bRgGI-unsplash-80x80.jpg 80w, https://www.appuntidizelda.it/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/elena-mozhvilo-wBenc1bRgGI-unsplash-500x500.jpg 500w, https://www.appuntidizelda.it/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/elena-mozhvilo-wBenc1bRgGI-unsplash-120x120.jpg 120w, https://www.appuntidizelda.it/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/elena-mozhvilo-wBenc1bRgGI-unsplash-90x90.jpg 90w, https://www.appuntidizelda.it/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/elena-mozhvilo-wBenc1bRgGI-unsplash-320x320.jpg 320w, https://www.appuntidizelda.it/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/elena-mozhvilo-wBenc1bRgGI-unsplash-800x800.jpg 800w, https://www.appuntidizelda.it/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/elena-mozhvilo-wBenc1bRgGI-unsplash-1160x1160.jpg 1160w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 560px) 100vw, 560px" title="Calendario dell’Avvento, boom di ricerche in Italia: +22% nel 2024 93">							</div>

							<div class="overlay-outer post-inner">
								<div class="overlay-inner">

									<ul class="post-meta"><li class="meta-category"><ul class="post-categories">
	<li><a href="https://www.appuntidizelda.it/lifestyle/" rel="category tag">Lifestyle</a></li></ul></li></ul>
									<h2 class="entry-title">
										<a href="https://www.appuntidizelda.it/calendario-dellavvento-boom-in-italia/">Calendario dell’Avvento, boom di ricerche in Italia: +22% nel 2024</a>
									</h2>

									<ul class="post-meta"><li class="meta-author"><span class="author"><a class="url fn n" href="https://www.appuntidizelda.it/author/redazione/" title="View all posts by redazione">redazione</a></span></li><li class="meta-date"><a href="https://www.appuntidizelda.it/calendario-dellavvento-boom-in-italia/" rel="bookmark">18 Dicembre 2024</a></li></ul>

<article class="post-grid post-42749 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail category-locali tag-dry-january-reboot tag-forketters tag-kombwine tag-legend-kombucha tag-low-alcol tag-tomatto-drinks">

	<div class="post-outer">

		
					<div class="post-inner">
				<div class="post-thumbnail">

	<li><a href="https://www.appuntidizelda.it/locali/" rel="category tag">Locali</a></li></ul></div>

				<ul class="post-meta"><li class="meta-date"><a href="https://www.appuntidizelda.it/forketters-dry-january-reboot-tapasotto/" rel="bookmark">4 Febbraio 2026</a></li><li class="meta-comments"><a href="https://www.appuntidizelda.it/forketters-dry-january-reboot-tapasotto/#comments" class="comments-link">Un commento</a></li></ul>			</header>

			
										<div class="post-excerpt">
								Si è appena concluso Forketters x Dry January Reboot – Senz’alcol, con gusto, il calendario di eventi che per tutto gennaio 2026 ha portato la filosofia del Dry January fuori dai binari&hellip;							</div>
							
		</div>

		
	</div>

									<div class="post-inner">

	<li><a href="https://www.appuntidizelda.it/cinema/" rel="category tag">Cinema</a></li></ul></div>
										<h2 class="entry-title">
											<a href="https://www.appuntidizelda.it/il-gusto-delle-cose-tran-anh-hung-recensione/">Il gusto delle cose recensione: il film francese che ti farà venire fame</a>

<hr class="wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity"/>



<iframe loading="lazy" src="https://www.google.com/maps/d/embed?mid=1BV3ZX8SHaHR0J9_xCJnWVt9iODAxY5M&#038;ehbc=2E312F" width="640" height="480"></iframe>



<hr class="wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity"/>

	</div>
</div>

			</div>
		</div>
	</div>

				</div>
	

					
				</div><!-- .main-content -->

				
			</div><!-- .container -->

			
		</div><!-- .site-content -->

		
		
		<footer class="site-footer section-heading-default-style-2">

	<div class="cs-container">
		<div class="footer-widgets">
			<div class="footer-sidebars">

									<div class="sidebar-footer widget-area">
						<div class="widget_text widget custom_html-31 widget_custom_html"><h5 class="section-heading is-style-cnvs-block-section-heading-default halignleft title-widget ">Iscriviti alla newsletter e resta aggiornato!</h5><div class="textwidget custom-html-widget"><iframe src="https://appuntidizelda.substack.com/embed" width="480" height="320" style="border:1px solid #EEE; background:white;" frameborder="0" scrolling="no"></iframe></div></div><div class="widget_text widget custom_html-22 widget_custom_html"><div class="textwidget custom-html-widget"><a href="http://travelbloggeritaliane.it"  rel=“nofollow”><img src="https://travelbloggeritaliane.it/wp-content/uploads/badge-travelbloggeritaliane-nero.png" alt="Blog della community Travel Blogger Italiane" width="300" height="300" /></a></div></div><div class="widget recent-comments-3 widget_recent_comments"><h5 class="section-heading is-style-cnvs-block-section-heading-default halignleft title-widget ">Commenti recenti</h5><ul id="recentcomments"><li class="recentcomments"><span class="comment-author-link"><a href="https://www.chiarasaroglia.com" class="url" rel="ugc external nofollow">Chiara 'oscuro_errante' Saroglia</a></span> su <a href="https://www.appuntidizelda.it/forketters-dry-january-reboot-tapasotto/#comment-6874">Senz’alcol, con gusto: il Dry January Reboot di Forketters fa tappa da TapaSotto</a></li><li class="recentcomments"><span class="comment-author-link"><a href="https://donnavagabonda.com/" class="url" rel="ugc external nofollow">Eliana</a></span> su <a href="https://www.appuntidizelda.it/polpette-di-tacchino-con-pistacchi/#comment-6321">Polpette di tacchino con pistacchi e mandorle</a></li></ul></div>					</div>

	<div class="widget-altervista-profile">
		<span class="av-profile-shape-circle">
		<img alt='' src='https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/1aa7f8add2b450cae63ff9c0f9012d5e31434fa166305f3827ac7dbc8403d80c?s=100&#038;r=g' srcset='https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/1aa7f8add2b450cae63ff9c0f9012d5e31434fa166305f3827ac7dbc8403d80c?s=200&#038;r=g 2x' class='avatar avatar-100 photo' height='100' width='100' loading='lazy' decoding='async'/>		</span>
		<h4>★Hello, sono Zelda! ★</h4>
		<p>Classe 99, girovaga a 360°. Tra un sorso, una lettura, mi piace parlare di enogastronomia e viaggi. Sogno un giorno di ritrovarmi a percorrere le strade della bellissima Uji, perché sono appassionata della cultura e gastronomia asiatica.</p>
	</div>
</div>

		<h4>★ Hello, sono Ioni ★</h4>
